label: OpenTofu Plan
description: Keep OpenTofu plan actions and summary while stripping refresh noise.

patterns: OpenTofu will perform the following actions

tests.name: inline sample
tests.input:
Refreshing state... [id=a]
OpenTofu will perform the following actions:
  # tofu_resource.web will be created
Plan: 1 to add, 0 to change, 0 to destroy.
tests.expected:
OpenTofu will perform the following actions:
  # tofu_resource.web will be created
Plan: 1 to add, 0 to change, 0 to destroy.
